description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, rounded carapace that is light tan with subtle speckling and a slightly rough texture. The crab features two prominent, upward-curving claws (chelae) that are robust and slightly darker at the tips, along with eight walking legs that are slender and taper to points, showing a gradient from pale cream to yellowish-brown. The underside is lighter, almost white, with visible segmentation and jointed appendages. The eyes are small and positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. No antennae are clearly visible in the images. The overall form is compact and sturdy, typical of crabs found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A tan, speckled crab with two large claws, eight slender legs, and a rounded, textured carapace. The eyes are on short stalks at the front, and the underside is pale and segmented.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both large claws raised, and the eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's body thickness, the curvature of the claws, and the layered legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pale, segmented underside and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the body profile and leg articulation.
